title: test_email_password_login_api
description: Verify that the POST /api/auth/login endpoint correctly authenticates users with valid email and password credentials and returns appropriate error messages for invalid credentials.

title: test_pin_login_api
description: Verify that the POST /api/auth/login/pin endpoint allows cashiers to login using a valid PIN and rejects invalid PINs with proper error responses.

title: test_pos_checkout_api
description: Verify that the POST /api/transactions endpoint processes sales transactions correctly including adding items, applying discounts, selecting payment methods, and completing the sale.

title: test_void_transaction_api
description: Verify that the POST /api/transactions/:id/void endpoint correctly voids a specified transaction and updates the transaction status accordingly.

title: test_product_search_api
description: Verify that the GET /api/products/search endpoint returns accurate product search results based on barcode, name, or SKU queries.

title: test_open_cash_shift_api
description: Verify that the POST /api/cash-sessions endpoint successfully opens a new cash shift with the specified opening cash amount and denominations.

title: test_close_cash_shift_api
description: Verify that the PATCH /api/cash-sessions/:id/close endpoint correctly closes an active cash shift, records closing cash count, and generates the Z-report with totals and discrepancies.

title: test_create_product_api
description: Verify that the POST /api/products endpoint allows creation of new products with all required details including name, SKU, barcode, price, category, variants, and modifier groups.

title: test_import_products_api
description: Verify that the POST /api/products/import endpoint correctly imports products from a CSV or Excel file and adds them to the product catalogue.

title: test_update_product_api
description: Verify that the PUT /api/products/:id endpoint updates existing product details correctly and reflects changes in the product catalogue.

title: test_auth_me_endpoint
description: Verify GET /api/auth/me returns the authenticated user's profile with valid token, and 401 with no/invalid token.

title: test_auth_logout_endpoint
description: Verify POST /api/auth/logout invalidates the session token and returns 200. Subsequent requests with the same token should return 401.

title: test_auth_token_refresh
description: Verify POST /api/auth/refresh returns a new valid token when given a valid token.

title: test_auth_security_no_token
description: Verify that accessing any protected endpoint (e.g., GET /api/catalog/products) without Authorization header returns 401.

title: test_auth_security_invalid_token
description: Verify that using Bearer invalidtoken123 on protected endpoints returns 401, not 500.

title: test_products_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/catalog/products returns paginated product list. Test filtering by category_id, search query, and is_active.

title: test_products_get_single_api
description: Verify GET /api/catalog/products/{id} returns product details for valid ID and 404 for unknown ID.

title: test_products_update_api
description: Verify PUT /api/catalog/products/{id} updates product name and price. Test 404 for unknown ID and 422 for invalid price.

title: test_products_delete_api
description: Verify DELETE /api/catalog/products/{id} removes a product. Verify 404 when deleting already-deleted product.

title: test_products_search_by_barcode
description: Verify GET /api/pos/products?barcode=<code> returns correct product for a known barcode and empty array for unknown barcode.

title: test_categories_crud_api
description: Verify full CRUD for /api/catalog/categories: list (200), create (201), get (200), update (200), delete (200). Test 422 for missing name.

title: test_suppliers_crud_api
description: Verify full CRUD for /api/catalog/suppliers: list (200), create (201), get (200), update (200). Test 422 for missing name.

title: test_stock_levels_api
description: Verify GET /api/inventory/stock-levels returns stock for all products. Test filtering by store_id and low_stock_only=true.

title: test_stock_adjustments_api
description: Verify POST /api/inventory/stock-adjustments creates adjustment with valid product_id and reason. Test 422 for zero quantity and missing product_id.

title: test_stock_movements_api
description: Verify GET /api/inventory/stock-movements returns movement history. Test filtering by product_id and date range.

title: test_stock_transfers_api
description: Verify POST /api/inventory/stock-transfers creates transfer between branches. Test 422 for same source/dest and empty items.

title: test_purchase_orders_api
description: Verify full flow: create PO (POST), list (GET), get single (GET), test 422 for missing supplier_id.

title: test_goods_receipts_api
description: Verify GET /api/inventory/goods-receipts lists all receipts. Test creating receipt against existing PO.

title: test_stocktakes_api
description: Verify GET /api/inventory/stocktakes returns list. Test POST creates new stocktake with valid store_id.

title: test_waste_records_api
description: Verify POST /api/inventory/waste-records creates record with valid product_id, quantity, and reason. Test 422 for zero quantity.

title: test_low_stock_alerts_api
description: Verify GET /api/inventory/low-stock returns products below threshold. Response includes product_id and current_stock.

title: test_expiry_alerts_api
description: Verify GET /api/inventory/expiry-alerts returns products with expiry dates. Response includes days_until_expiry.

title: test_pos_sessions_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/pos/sessions returns list of POS sessions with status, opening_cash, and terminal info.

title: test_pos_session_create_api
description: Verify POST /api/pos/sessions creates session with opening_cash and terminal_id. Test 422 for negative opening_cash.

title: test_pos_session_close_api
description: Verify POST /api/pos/sessions/{id}/close closes open session with closing_cash and returns z_report. Test 422 for already-closed session.

title: test_pos_transactions_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/pos/transactions with date range filter returns paginated results with payment_method and total.

title: test_pos_held_carts_api
description: Verify POST /api/pos/held-carts saves cart. GET /api/pos/held-carts returns saved carts. DELETE removes held cart.

title: test_pos_terminals_api
description: Verify GET /api/pos/terminals returns list of configured POS terminals with name and status.

title: test_orders_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/orders with status=pending filter returns pending orders. Test source=delivery filter returns delivery orders.

title: test_orders_get_api
description: Verify GET /api/orders/{id} returns order details with items and status. Test 404 for unknown ID.

title: test_orders_status_update_api
description: Verify PATCH /api/orders/{id} accepts status=accepted, preparing, ready, completed. Test 422 for invalid status value.

title: test_orders_cancel_api
description: Verify PATCH /api/orders/{id} with status=cancelled marks order as cancelled. Test that cancelling an already-completed order returns 422.

title: test_returns_create_api
description: Verify POST /api/orders/returns creates return with order_id, items, and reason. Returns 201 with refund_amount. Test 422 for missing order_id.

title: test_returns_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/orders/returns returns list of returns with refund amounts and reasons.

title: test_payments_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/payments returns paginated payment history with amount, method, and transaction ID.

title: test_cash_sessions_api
description: Verify GET /api/cash-sessions returns list. POST /api/cash-sessions/{id}/close closes session. Test 422 for already-closed.

title: test_expenses_crud_api
description: Verify full CRUD for /api/expenses: list (200), create (201), update (200), delete (200). Test 422 for negative amount.

title: test_gift_cards_api
description: Verify GET /api/gift-cards lists cards. GET /api/gift-cards/{code}/balance returns balance. Test 404 for unknown code.

title: test_gift_card_redeem_api
description: Verify POST /api/gift-cards/{code}/redeem deducts amount from balance. Test 422 when redeem amount exceeds balance.

title: test_finance_daily_summary_api
description: Verify GET /api/finance/daily-summary returns total_sales, total_expenses, and net_profit for today's date.

title: test_finance_reconciliation_api
description: Verify GET /api/finance/reconciliation returns reconciliation records with expected_cash and actual_cash fields.

title: test_payment_refund_api
description: Verify POST /api/payments/{id}/refunds creates refund for valid payment. Test 422 for refund exceeding original payment amount.

title: test_customers_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/customers returns paginated list. Test search by name and phone. Verify 401 without auth.

title: test_customers_create_api
description: Verify POST /api/customers creates customer. Test 422 for duplicate phone, missing name, and invalid email format.

title: test_customers_get_api
description: Verify GET /api/customers/{id} returns customer with loyalty_balance and purchase_count. Test 404 for unknown ID.

title: test_customers_update_api
description: Verify PUT /api/customers/{id} updates name, phone, and email. Test 404 for unknown ID and 422 for duplicate phone.

title: test_customers_delete_api
description: Verify DELETE /api/customers/{id} removes customer. Test 404 for unknown ID.

title: test_customers_search_api
description: Verify GET /api/customers/search?q=<term> returns matching customers. Empty results return 200 with empty array.

title: test_customer_orders_api
description: Verify GET /api/customers/{id}/orders returns order history for the customer.

title: test_customer_loyalty_adjust_api
description: Verify POST /api/customers/{id}/loyalty/adjust adds or deducts points. Test 422 when deducting more than current balance.

title: test_customer_loyalty_redeem_api
description: Verify POST /api/customers/{id}/loyalty/redeem converts points to discount. Test 422 for insufficient points.

title: test_customer_store_credit_api
description: Verify POST /api/customers/{id}/store-credit/top-up adds credit. Verify 422 for zero or negative amount.

title: test_customer_groups_api
description: Verify GET /api/customers/groups/list returns groups. POST /api/customers/groups creates group with name and discount config.

title: test_dashboard_summary_api
description: Verify GET /api/owner-dashboard/summary returns total_sales, order_count, and revenue for today. Verify 401 without auth.

title: test_dashboard_sales_trend_api
description: Verify GET /api/owner-dashboard/sales-trend?period=weekly returns 7-point data array. Test period=monthly returns 30-point array.

title: test_dashboard_top_products_api
description: Verify GET /api/owner-dashboard/top-products returns ranked list with product_name, quantity_sold, and revenue.

title: test_dashboard_recent_orders_api
description: Verify GET /api/owner-dashboard/recent-orders returns the 10 most recent orders with status and total.

title: test_dashboard_financial_summary_api
description: Verify GET /api/owner-dashboard/financial-summary returns revenue, expenses, and net_profit fields.

title: test_dashboard_active_cashiers_api
description: Verify GET /api/owner-dashboard/active-cashiers returns list of currently active cashier sessions.

title: test_dashboard_hourly_sales_api
description: Verify GET /api/owner-dashboard/hourly-sales returns 24-element array of hourly sales totals.

title: test_dashboard_branches_api
description: Verify GET /api/owner-dashboard/branches returns list of branches with today's sales and order counts.

title: test_reports_sales_summary_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/sales-summary with from_date and to_date returns total_sales, order_count, and avg_order_value.

title: test_reports_daily_sales_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/daily-sales?date=<YYYY-MM-DD> returns hourly breakdown for the specified date.

title: test_reports_product_sales_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/product-sales with date range returns ranked products with quantity and revenue.

title: test_reports_product_performance_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/product-performance returns products with margin, sell-through rate, and velocity.

title: test_reports_category_breakdown_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/category-breakdown returns sales by category with percentage of total.

title: test_reports_staff_performance_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/staff-performance returns per-staff sales count, revenue, and avg transaction value.

title: test_reports_payment_methods_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/payment-methods returns breakdown of cash, card, and other payment methods with totals.

title: test_reports_inventory_valuation_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/inventory/valuation returns total_value, total_units, and per-product breakdown.

title: test_reports_inventory_turnover_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/inventory/turnover returns turnover rate per product.

title: test_reports_inventory_shrinkage_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/inventory/shrinkage returns waste and unexplained loss records.

title: test_reports_financial_daily_pl_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/financial/daily-pl returns revenue, cost_of_goods, gross_profit, and expenses.

title: test_reports_financial_cash_variance_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/financial/cash-variance returns sessions with expected vs actual cash and variance.

title: test_reports_top_customers_api
description: Verify GET /api/reports/customers/top returns ranked customers by spend with visit_count and total_spent.

title: test_reports_export_pdf_api
description: Verify POST /api/reports/export with format=pdf returns download_url. Test 422 for unsupported format.

title: test_staff_members_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/staff/members returns list with name, role, and status. Test 401 without auth.

title: test_staff_members_create_api
description: Verify POST /api/staff/members creates member with name, role_id, pin, and email. Test 422 for duplicate PIN and missing name.

title: test_staff_members_get_api
description: Verify GET /api/staff/members/{id} returns member details with role and permissions. Test 404 for unknown ID.

title: test_staff_members_update_api
description: Verify PUT /api/staff/members/{id} updates name and role. Test 422 for invalid role_id.

title: test_staff_members_delete_api
description: Verify DELETE /api/staff/members/{id} deactivates or removes member. Test 404 for unknown ID.

title: test_staff_pin_update_api
description: Verify PUT /api/staff/members/{id}/pin updates PIN. Test 422 for duplicate PIN collision with another member.

title: test_staff_roles_crud_api
description: Verify GET /api/staff/roles lists roles. POST creates role with name and permissions. GET/{id} returns single role. Test 404 for unknown ID.

title: test_staff_permissions_api
description: Verify GET /api/staff/permissions returns flat permission list. GET /api/staff/permissions/grouped returns module-grouped permissions.

title: test_staff_attendance_clock_api
description: Verify POST /api/staff/attendance/clock with action=clock_in returns timestamp. Test clock_out works. Test 422 for invalid action.

title: test_staff_attendance_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/staff/attendance returns attendance records with clock_in, clock_out, and hours_worked.

title: test_staff_shifts_api
description: Verify GET /api/staff/shifts returns shift schedule. POST creates shift with staff_id, start_time, end_time. Test 422 for end before start.

title: test_pin_override_check_api
description: Verify POST /api/staff/pin-override/check returns authorized=true for valid manager PIN. Returns authorized=false for wrong PIN without raising error.

title: test_staff_member_activity_log_api
description: Verify GET /api/staff/members/{id}/activity-log returns timestamped actions performed by the staff member.

title: test_notifications_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/notifications returns list with unread_count. Test 401 without auth.

title: test_notifications_unread_count_api
description: Verify GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns count integer. After read-all, count should be 0.

title: test_notifications_read_all_api
description: Verify POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all notifications read. Subsequent unread-count returns 0.

title: test_notification_preferences_api
description: Verify GET /api/notifications/preferences returns push_enabled and email_enabled. PUT updates preferences.

title: test_promotions_list_api
description: Verify GET /api/promotions returns list. Test filter by status=active returns only active promotions.

title: test_promotions_create_api
description: Verify POST /api/promotions creates promotion with name, type=percentage, value, starts_at, ends_at. Test 422 for end before start.

title: test_promotions_toggle_api
description: Verify POST /api/promotions/{id}/toggle toggles is_active. Call twice to restore original state.

title: test_promotions_duplicate_api
description: Verify POST /api/promotions/{id}/duplicate creates a copy of the promotion. Returns 201 with new ID.

title: test_coupon_validate_api
description: Verify POST /api/coupons/validate with valid code returns valid=true and discount amount. Test expired code returns valid=false. Test unknown code returns valid=false.

title: test_coupon_redeem_api
description: Verify POST /api/coupons/redeem marks coupon used. Reusing same single-use coupon returns 422.

title: test_promotions_evaluate_api
description: Verify POST /api/promotions/evaluate with cart_items and customer_id returns applicable_promotions and total_discount. Empty cart returns zero discount.

title: test_config_feature_flags_api
description: Verify GET /api/config/feature-flags returns flag map object. Test that unauthorized access returns 401.

title: test_config_maintenance_api
description: Verify GET /api/config/maintenance returns is_maintenance boolean without auth token. This is a public endpoint.

title: test_config_tax_api
description: Verify GET /api/config/tax returns tax rate and name. For Saudi stores expect rate=15 and name=VAT.

title: test_config_payment_methods_api
description: Verify GET /api/config/payment-methods returns list of enabled payment methods (cash, card, etc.).

title: test_config_security_policies_api
description: Verify GET /api/config/security-policies returns pin_required_actions, session_timeout, and max_failed_attempts.

title: test_subscription_plans_api
description: Verify GET /api/subscription/plans returns available plans with name, price, and feature limits.

title: test_subscription_current_api
description: Verify GET /api/subscription/current returns plan name, status, and renewal_date for the authenticated store.

title: test_subscription_usage_api
description: Verify GET /api/subscription/usage returns current usage vs limits for products, staff, branches, and transactions.

title: test_subscription_invoices_api
description: Verify GET /api/subscription/invoices returns payment history with invoice_date, amount, and status.

title: test_subscription_check_feature_api
description: Verify GET /api/subscription/check-feature?feature=<name> returns allowed=true/false based on current plan.

title: test_stores_mine_api
description: Verify GET /api/core/stores/mine returns list of stores owned by authenticated user with id, name, and currency.

title: test_business_types_public_api
description: Verify GET /api/onboarding/business-types returns list of business types without authentication. Each type has slug and name.

title: test_onboarding_steps_api
description: Verify GET /api/core/onboarding/steps returns steps list with is_completed flags.

title: test_onboarding_complete_step_api
description: Verify POST /api/core/onboarding/complete-step with valid step name marks it complete. Idempotent: calling again returns same 200 response.

title: test_onboarding_checklist_api
description: Verify GET /api/core/onboarding/checklist returns checklist items with completion percentage.

title: test_label_templates_api
description: Verify GET /api/labels/templates lists templates. POST creates new template with name and layout. Test 422 for missing name.

title: test_label_presets_api
description: Verify GET /api/labels/templates/presets returns system-provided label presets with dimensions and layout.

title: test_label_print_history_api
description: Verify GET /api/labels/print-history returns print jobs with product_ids, template_id, and quantity.

title: test_label_print_history_stats_api
description: Verify GET /api/labels/print-history/stats returns total labels printed, most-used template, and daily average.

title: test_role_based_access_cashier
description: Authenticate as cashier (low-privilege role) and verify that accessing admin endpoints like GET /api/admin/stores returns 403 Forbidden.

title: test_role_based_access_owner
description: Authenticate as owner and verify access to owner-only endpoints like GET /api/owner-dashboard/summary returns 200. Verify cashier cannot access these.

title: test_input_validation_xss_prevention
description: Verify that submitting HTML/script tags in product name (POST /api/catalog/products with name='<script>alert(1)</script>') either sanitizes or rejects the input.

title: test_input_validation_sql_injection_prevention
description: Verify search endpoints (GET /api/customers?search='; DROP TABLE customers;--) return safe response, not 500 error.

title: test_pagination_api
description: Verify GET /api/catalog/products?page=1&per_page=5 returns 5 items. page=2 returns next 5. Last page returns remaining items.

title: test_concurrent_pos_sessions
description: Verify that opening a second POS session on the same terminal while one is already open returns 422 with appropriate error.

title: test_inventory_insufficient_stock_checkout
description: Verify that POST /api/pos/transactions with items exceeding available stock returns 422 with out_of_stock error.
